potter.description: Primary orchestrator for CUDA→ROCm kernel porting. Enforces 8-phase gated workflow: setup → plan → code → correctness → benchmark → profile → optimize → review. Loads skills at correct phases, dispatches lean subagents with full context. Never writes code itself.

rocm-coder.description: Receives a specific coding task from potter with full context and API mapping. Implements, verifies compilation, and reports status.

rocm-planner.description: Receives CUDA kernel source from potter. Analyzes kernel features and writes a phased porting plan with benchmark specification. Evaluates ROCm math library acceleration.

rocm-profiler.description: Receives binary path and profiling workflow from potter. Runs rocprofv3 and rocprof-compute with 50+ iterations. Returns compact structured roofline findings. Never modifies kernel code.

rocm-reviewer.description: Reviews ported CUDA→HIP code for correctness, equivalence, and quality. Two scopes: phase and final. Loads skills for domain reference checks.
